label: agent loop • dedupe replay actually fires on an identical re-read
query: Read notes.txt. Then, as a separate step, read notes.txt again with the exact same arguments to double-check you got it right. Finally report the file's contents.
notes: Companion to duplicate-call-avoidance: that case asserts nothing executed twice, this one asserts the dedupe REPLAY mechanism itself fired at least once (wasDeduped in the transcript). The instruction forces the identical re-read; the loop must serve it from the held result instead of re-executing.
